name: Mongolian Beef# 2
recipeInstructions:
~------------------------------SAUCE------------------- ~-
1. Cut the flank steak across the grain into strips about 2 inches long and very thin.
2. Add seasoning to the meat.
3. Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
4. Heat a wok or large skillet over high heat.
5. Add oil, then quickly add garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
6. Add beef and onions, stirring frequently until the meat is browned and tender.
7. Pour in the sauce mixture, mixing to coat the steak evenly.
8. Cook for about 1 minute more, allowing the flavors to meld.
